nodes.title: List Employees
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/employees with Authorization header. Returns array of employees with {id, name, phone, position, stationId, billingAccounts[]}.

nodes.title: Create Employee
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/employees with {name, phone?, position?, stationId?}. Creates employee record. Returns created employee.

nodes.title: Update Employee
nodes.description: PUT /api/businesses/:bizId/employees/:id with {name?, phone?, position?, stationId?}. Updates employee fields. Returns updated employee.

nodes.title: Delete Employee
nodes.description: DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/employees/:id. Removes employee record. Returns 200 with {message: 'تم الحذف'}.

nodes.title: Manage Billing Accounts
nodes.description: CRUD for employee billing accounts. POST /api/employee-billing-accounts with {employeeId, accountId, billingSystemId}. PUT /api/employee-billing-accounts/:id. DELETE /api/employee-billing-accounts/:id. GET /api/businesses/:bizId/employee-billing-accounts returns all.
